scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');try{const src=path.join('node_modules','gif.js','dist','gif.worker.js');const dest=path.join('public','gif.worker.js');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dest);console.log('Copied gif.worker.js to public/');}}catch(e){console.log('gif.worker.js copy skipped:',e.message);}"
